prestazioni: Engine: S14B23 (2.3L inline-4, 86.4mm bore, 91mm stroke) upgraded with a Schrick 284° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust) paired with Ferrea 6000-series titanium retainers and Supertech valve springs for 9,000 RPM stability. Custom 3.5-inch individual throttle bodies (ITBs) by Jenvey Dynamics with velocity stacks and a Motec M800 ECU for sequential fuel injection and ignition mapping.

Forced Induction: Single-turbo conversion using a Garrett GT3076R (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom cast-iron exhaust manifold by Turbonetics, feeding into a 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a GReddy Revolution RS muffler. Intercooled via a custom air-to-water setup with a PWR radiator and Bosch 044 fuel pump supporting 450whp on E85.

Drivetrain: OS Giken 2.2L limited-slip differential with 85% lockup, paired with a Getrag 265 5-speed dogleg gearbox (close-ratio gears) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm). Custom half-shafts by Driveshaft Shop with CV joints rated for 500+ lb-ft torque.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V1 E30 kit (fenders, front bumper, rear diffuser) with custom 2.5-inch extended overfenders. Carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling. Rear wing: custom 3-piece GT-style wing by APR Performance (27-inch chord, 6-inch height) with aluminum endplates.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E (E30-specific) bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by Matter Fab (8-point, TIG-welded, 1.75-inch DOM tubing) with integrated fire suppression system by SPA Techniques. Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a custom aluminum shift knob (dogleg pattern) by CAE.

Wheels: BBS RS-GT II (16x9 ET15 front, 16x10 ET0 rear) with custom offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/45/16 front, 245/40/16 rear). Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (2-way adjustable) with custom valving for E30 chassis, paired with Eibach sway bars (25mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing end links by SuperPro.
